# chalk Provider

~> **Provider under development** This provider is currently in beta. While we strive to maintain backward compatibility and minimize bugs, breaking changes or bugs may be introduced in new versions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    chalk = {
      source = "chalk-ai/chalk"
    }
  }
}

provider "chalk" {
  # Authentication option 1: client ID and secret
  client_id     = var.chalk_client_id
  client_secret = var.chalk_client_secret

  # Authentication option 2: JWT token directly
  # jwt = var.chalk_jwt

  # Authentication option 3: command to retrieve JWT token (e.g. Chalk CLI)
  # jwt_command_process = "chalk token"

  # Optional: override the API server (defaults to https://api.chalk.ai)
  # api_server = "https://api.chalk.ai"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_server` (String) Chalk API server URL. Can also be set via CHALK_API_SERVER environment variable. Defaults to https://api.chalk.ai
- `client_id` (String) Chalk client ID for authentication. Can also be set via CHALK_CLIENT_ID environment variable.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) Chalk client secret for authentication. Can also be set via CHALK_CLIENT_SECRET environment variable.
- `jwt` (String, Sensitive) JWT token for authentication. Can also be set via CHALK_JWT environment variable. If provided, this takes precedence over client_id/client_secret.
- `jwt_command_process` (String) Shell command to execute to retrieve JWT token. Can also be set via CHALK_JWT_COMMAND_PROCESS environment variable. The command's stdout will be used as the JWT token.
